gated_on: CEO review of the Sprint 3 charter (D114) before build starts; P1 -- cut cleanly if the executor-day runs short
notes: P1, size S. Drains I010 (audit A010). Two bounded halves: (1) opt-in JSONL sink for published bus events (default FALSE; sink failure never blocks publish); (2) max_sse_streams cap (default 8, refuse-with-429, never evict an existing stream, finally-guarded counter). SECURITY stage fires (resource-exhaustion surface). Do NOT touch event types, payload shapes, or the Telegram bridge -- the F014/D100 Legal rolling constraints stay untouched. No new public claims.
acceptance: Sink on: publish -> restart -> event on disk; sink off (default): byte-identical behaviour
Sink write failure isolated -- publish returns normally, consumers still receive
Stream N+1 past cap gets 429 + Retry-After; teardown admits next; no counter leak on abrupt close
